student_verification.name: AML Part B Student
student_verification.declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed below are complete and accurate, and that all decisions regarding ablation choices, failure mode identification, and honest reflection are my own.

interactions.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page report covering reproduction, ablation, failure mode, and reflection.
interactions.response_summary: Suggested 5-section structure matching the requirements. Advised keeping each section to 1-2 paragraphs.

interactions.prompt: Help me write the reflection section honestly.
interactions.response_summary: Advised to focus on what genuinely surprised me (Ablation 1 collapse) and what real dataset experiments would reveal.
